title: HIP 41378 c
summary: HIP 41378 c (also known as EPIC 211311380 c)  is an exoplanet orbiting around the F-type star HIP 41378. It has a radius about 2.7 times that of Earth.
text: HIP 41378 c (also known as EPIC 211311380 c)  is an exoplanet orbiting around the F-type star HIP 41378. It has a radius about 2.7 times that of Earth.
